hero.badge: Cambridge IGCSE · AS & A Levels · IB
hero.subtitle: Expert tutoring for Cambridge IGCSE, A Levels, and IB students worldwide. Personalized guidance to unlock your full potential.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Empowering Students to
about.description: Based in Tunis and operating fully online, EduRush Academy is dedicated to developing confident thinkers, innovators, and future leaders. We provide world-class academic support for students pursuing internationally recognized curricula.
about.missionDesc: To make high-quality academic support accessible to every student, regardless of location, empowering them to excel in globally recognized curricula.
about.visionDesc: To be the leading online academy for international education, nurturing the next generation of global thinkers and leaders.
about.globalDesc: From Tunis to the world — our fully online platform connects expert tutors with students across continents, ensuring personalized guidance wherever they are.

programs.label: Academic Programs
programs.title: Curricula We
programs.subtitle: Tailored academic programs designed to help students master their curriculum and achieve outstanding results.
programs.igcseDesc: Comprehensive tutoring across all IGCSE subjects with a focus on exam technique, concept mastery, and coursework support.
programs.alevelsDesc: Advanced-level preparation designed to help students achieve top grades and secure offers from leading universities worldwide.
programs.ibDesc: Full support for the IB Diploma Programme including core components — TOK, Extended Essay, and CAS guidance.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.title: The EduRush
whyUs.subtitle: We go beyond tutoring to provide a complete academic success ecosystem.
whyUs.expertTutorsDesc: Highly qualified educators with years of experience in Cambridge and IB curricula.
whyUs.personalizedDesc: Tailored study plans that adapt to each student's pace, strengths, and goals.
whyUs.flexibleDesc: Sessions available around the clock to suit students across every timezone.
whyUs.provenDesc: 98% of our students improve by at least one full grade within their first term.
whyUs.progressDesc: Detailed analytics and regular reports keep students and parents informed.
whyUs.dedicatedDesc: Academic coordinators provide ongoing guidance beyond just tutoring sessions.

tutorProfiles.label: Our Tutors
tutorProfiles.title: Meet Our
tutorProfiles.subtitle: Passionate, qualified tutors dedicated to helping students achieve academic excellence.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Student
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from students and parents who've experienced the EduRush difference.

skills.label: Beyond Academics
skills.title: Skills &
skills.subtitle: We equip students with the soft skills and digital competencies needed to thrive in an interconnected world.
skills.communicationDesc: Build confidence in public speaking, writing, and interpersonal skills.
skills.criticalThinkingDesc: Develop analytical reasoning and problem-solving approaches.
skills.leadershipDesc: Cultivate leadership qualities through collaborative projects and mentoring.
skills.digitalLiteracyDesc: Master essential digital tools for academic and professional success.
skills.productivityDesc: Learn efficient workflows with modern productivity software.
skills.techFundamentalsDesc: Gain foundational technology skills for the modern digital world.

howItWorks.label: Our Process
howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, structured approach to help you reach your academic goals.
howItWorks.assessmentDesc: We evaluate your current level, goals, and curriculum requirements through an initial consultation.
howItWorks.planDesc: A tailored study plan is crafted based on your strengths, weaknesses, and exam timeline.
howItWorks.sessionsDesc: Engage in interactive one-on-one or small group sessions with expert tutors.
howItWorks.trackingDesc: Regular reports and feedback ensure continuous improvement and goal achievement.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Book a Free
contact.subtitle: Ready to start your journey? Fill out the form and our team will get in touch within 24 hours.
contact.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
